title: paraeremostachys phlomoides

The flavonoids present in this plant, including quercetin and kaempferol, have been shown to exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities, which can help alleviate symptoms of conditions such as arthritis and improve cardiovascular health. side_effects: Paraeremostachys phlomoides can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including diarrhea, nausea, and stomach pain, due to its high concentration of alkaloids and glycosides. Prolonged use of the plant may also lead to liver and kidney damage, as well as allergic reactions, such as skin rashes and itching. In severe cases, improper use of paraeremostachys phlomoides can cause respiratory problems, including difficulty breathing and bronchitis, especially in individuals with pre-existing conditions.
